next_steps: Send urine for Legionella urinary antigen testing
Initiate empiric coverage for atypical pneumonia (e.g., adding levofloxacin or azithromycin)
Aggressive intravenous fluid resuscitation for rhabdomyolysis and AKI management
Monitor urine output and consider continuous renal replacement therapy if anuria persists
Perform bronchoscopy with bronchoalveolar lavage for culture, cytology, and PCR (respiratory viral panel and atypical pathogens)
Check HIV status and perform serum testing for autoimmune myositis markers
Request infectious disease and nephrology consultations
